caption: A wide shot of an American football game takes place in a crowded stadium on a green field marked with white lines and yellow markers. Players in white jerseys and blue pants are positioned across the field, with some congregating near a red and yellow end zone. A small inset window in the bottom left shows a man with blond hair wearing a navy blue shirt. Across the top, a digital scoreboard displays "2nd & 10," a team logo, the score "0", and the game clock showing "1st 0:14 43 :10". As the sequence progresses, the players on the field shift slightly in position, and the game clock changes from "0:14" to "0:13". The man in the inset window remains visible, showing subtle changes in his facial expression while looking toward the camera.
